name: claude-pip
description: Performance Improvement Plan for Claude. Five triggers covering a rule's full lifecycle. CLAUDE PIP / LOCAL PIP capture rules (master or directory-scoped). OFF THE PIP removes by id or keyword. PRUNE THE PIP audits the rules; default verdict is keep (carry-forward is the point). PROMOTE THE PIP graduates stable rules to canonical homes (CLAUDE.md, DESIGN.md, user-global) — the user picks which. Every rule wrapped in HTML-comment markers so it can be removed mechanically.
